description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, fetch submodules, install dependencies, install Rust, generate a build system with CMake, build the project, and upload a Linux artifact. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest, check out the code, fetch submodules, install Rust, download RapidJSON, generate a build system with CMake, build the project, and upload a Windows artifact.
